caption: The video appears to be a presentation from EuroPython 2018, held in Edinburgh from July 23-29, 2018. The speaker, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, is discussing Apache Airflow, an open-source platform for programmatically authoring, scheduling, and monitoring workflows. Initially, the slide encourages viewers to visit "airflow.apache.org" to learn more. As the presentation progresses, the speaker transitions to a slide titled "Airflow Alternatives," listing other similar tools such as Luigi, Pinball, and Seldon Core. He also mentions "Other Similar (But Different)" tools like Dask and Apache Kafka, likely comparing their functionalities and use cases with Airflow. The speaker gestures towards the screen, emphasizing the points being made about these alternatives.
